titleStmt.title: SII 28.140: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 140. (A.R. No. 295 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, north wall.

Records the order issued by Kulaśēkharachchōḻa-kōṉ and addressed to Mudaliyār Tiruvaiyāṟuḍaiyār and ṉāṭṭār intimating to them the exemption from various taxes and levies (kāśu-kaḍamai, nel-kaḍamai, māvaḍai, puṉpayir-āyam, nāṭṭu-viniyōgam, kīṟṟu-vari, koṟṟu-ilakkai, kaḍay-kūṭṭu-ilakkai, mugam-ppārvai, kāttigaipacchai, piḷḷaiyār-ṉoppi, eḍuttu-kāṭṭum-pachchai, vāśal-viniyōgam, ōlai-eḻuttu-viniyōgam, ilāñchiṉai-pēru and such upādis) as also the obligations to the temple (uḍaiyār Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyārkōyil-tēvaigaḷ, pōnga-paḻa-nel pūri-nel, pataṟu tirukkāttikai-pachchai, tiruvachaṉataṉa-paichchai, tiruppudiyūr-pachchai and such pachchais and tēvais) in respect of the following blocs of land granted for stated purposes.

1. 22(1/2) vēlis granted for the maintenance (jīvanam) and clothes (puḍavai-mudal) of various persons connected with the water distribution-shed (taṇṇīr-paṇdal) set up in the ānai-ēṟṟu-kkūḍam by Āṟkāḍu-kiḻār Chēdiyarāyar.
2. 24 vēlis granted for feeding 54 tirumēnis (devotees ?) (daily ?) in that ūr.
3. 2 vēlis granted for the charges of supervising (maḍam-aḻivu chōrvum nōkkavum koḷḷavum) managing the benefaction in No. 2 above.

4. 26. vēlis, distributed in two places gifted for the maintenance (jivaṉam), aḻivu (other incidental expenses ?) and vēshṭi-loin-cloth ?) of 32 brahmin scholars (brahmaṇa-vidvān) meant to be maintained and fed (ūṭṭukku) in this ūr.
5. 24. vēlis distributed in two places, meant for feeding 54 tirumēnis in Chīkāḻi (Śīrkāḻi).
6. 2. vēlis for the carrying out of the duty of supervising the benefaction in No. 5 above -Total = 100(1/2) vēli

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī ḥ§ śrīmelkittikkumel komāṟapaṉmar tirupuvaṉaccakkaravatti śrīvikramapāṇṭiya tevarkku yāṇṭu nālāvatu nāḷ patiṉeṭṭināl kulacekaraccoḻakoṉ Olai § Uṭaiyār
tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār koyil kaṇkāṇi karaṇattārum tirumāḷikai mulataānattārum tirukkaioṭṭi paṇṭārattārum kaṇṭu Āṟkāṭu kiḻār cetiyarāyar vaiytta Irācākkaḷ tampirāṉ tirumāḷikaiyil
kīḻaittirunilai Eḻu kopurat tiruvācalil teṉpakkattu Āṉai Eṟṟukkūṭattu vaiytta taṇṇīr pantalukku pālūṟṟu taṇṇīr Eṭukkum tirumeṉikaḷ per muppatum vārkkum tirumeṉikaḷ per Aiñcum
muppar per Oṉṟum Ākapper muppattu Āṟukku jīvaṉattukkum puṭavai mutalukkum Āṇṭu Oṉṟukku veṇṭum nellu muvvāyirattu Aimpattunārk kalattukku Aṭaitta tiruvītikku meṟku vaṭakāl
kaṭakkamāṉa Aṉapāyaccaruppetimaṅkalattu kāṇiyāḷar kāṇiyil Aṭaitta nilam Irupattu Iraṇṭaraiyum Ivvūril Amutu ceyyum tirumeṉikaḷ per Aimpattu nālvarkku jīvaṉattukkum Aḻivukkum
veṇṭum mutalukku muvāyirattu Irunūṟṟu Aṟupattu nāṟkalattukku Aṭaitta meṟku vaṭakāl cuttavallic caruppetimaṅkalattu piṭākai pāḷamaṅkalam nilam Irupattunāl veliyum
maṭam Aḻivu corvum nokkavum niṟkkum perkku Ivvūril nilam Iruveliyum Āka nilam Irupattu Aṟu veliyum Ivvūril Ūṭṭukku kalpitta brahmavidvānkaḷ per muppattiruvarkku jīvaṉattukkum
Aḻivukkum veṭṭikkum Āṇṭu Oṉṟukku veṇṭum mutalukku nellu muvāyirattu Aiññūṟṟu Irupatiṅ kalattukku Aṭaitta meṟkku vaṭakāl kaṭuvaṅkuṭi nilam patiṟṟu veliyum tiraimur nilam
patiṉaṟu veliyum Āka nilam Irupattu Aṟu veliyum cīrkāḻiyil Amutu ceyyum tirumenikaḷ per Aimpattu ṉālvarkku jīvaṉattukkum Aḻivukkum veṇṭum mutalukku Āṇṭu Oṉṟukku veṇṭum nellu muvāyirattu
Irunūṟṟu Aṟupattu nārkalattukku Aṭaitta teṉkāl Iḷamaṅkalam nilam patināl veliyum tiruvālippiṭākai koṇṇattūr nilam patiṟṟu veliyum Ākanilam Irupattuṉāl veliyum maṭam Aḻivu corvum koḷḷavum Ivvūril nikku
m perkku Ivvūril nilam Iruveliyum Āka nilam Irupattu Aṟuveliyum Ākanilam � veliyum Innilam nūṟṟu Arai veliyum mutal Aṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭu Iṉnilam kārum maṟuvum Orupūvum vampum kuṟuvaiyum kamukum ko(ṭa)
ḻuṉtum vāḻaiyum mapaccaḷaThe intended word is mañcaḷIñci karumpu Uḷḷuṭṭa payir ceytukoṇṭu Iṉnilattil kācu kaṭamai nelkaṭamai māvaṭai puṉpayir Āyam nāṭṭuviniyokam kīṟṟuvari koṟṟu Ilakkai mukam(p)pārvvai kāttikai paccaThe intended word is kāttikai paccaipiḷḷai
yārṉoppi Eṭuttukāṭṭumpaiccai vācalviniyokam Olai Eḻuttu viniyokam Ilāñcaṉaipeṟu Aṉaittum Upātikaḷum Uḷpaṭavum Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalam Uṭaiyār koyil tevaikaḷum ponaka paḻanellum pūrinellum payaṟum tirukkā
ttikai payaccai § tiravacaṉataṉṉāpaiccai tirupputiyūr paccai Uḷḷuṭṭa paiccai tevaikaḷum kaḻiccu Ippaṭikku vikkiramacoḻaṉ tirumāḷikaiyil kalveṭṭi kuṭuppateṉṟu mutaliyār tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyārkkum ṉāṭṭārkkum prasātam ceytaruḷiṉa
Eḻutina tirumukam varukaiyil tirumukapaṭi kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷḷavum paṇṇuvate Ippaṭi ceyya paṇṇuvate Ippaṭikku Ivai coḻakoṉār Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 28.140 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
